subcodes.first_line: O My Name! We make mention of one of Our kindred who hath been named Ja'far. We bear witness that he turned unto the Most Great Horizon and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی انا نذکر احد افنانی الذی سمی بجعفر نشهد انه اقبل الی المنظر الاکبر و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
